# Database migrations (Alembic)

Migrations are async-aware (see `env.py`) and read the connection string from
the `DATABASE_URL` environment variable only — no secrets are committed.

Common commands (run from `backend/`):

```bash
# Apply all migrations
alembic upgrade head

# Create a new autogenerated revision (requires a reachable DATABASE_URL)
alembic revision --autogenerate -m "describe change"

# Roll back the most recent migration
alembic downgrade -1
```

On Render, `alembic upgrade head` runs as a release/deploy step (task 23.3).
